THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 3/22/10 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF 1/10/11 IS VACATED. PLTF TO CONTACT DEPT. 502 FOR MSC DATES. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. ANY AND ALL DISCOVERY MOTIONS WITH THE EXCEPTION OF DISPOSITIVE MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WILL BE HEARD IN DEPT. 206. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PLTF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFT WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM TODAY. IF PLTF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES AFTER THE DUE DATE THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECL AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT IDENTIFIED PREVIOUSLY. ALL DEFTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL SUPPORT PROP 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFT WITHIN 50 DAYS FROM TODAY. IF DEFTS LEARN OF NEW WITNESSES AND OR DOCUMENTS, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED PREVIOUSLY. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE E-SERVED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: HELEN SOREP-MATLEY

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for petitioner Carrie Jones, the Guardian ad Litem for the minor Ruthiea Wilson.
Order waiving the appearance of the Guardian ad Litem and the minor at today's hearing was filed on August 2, 2011.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $2,765.35.
Attorney Fees - $541.56.
Costs - $646.57.

The net balance of $1,577.22 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 5150 Mission Street, San Francisco, Ca 94112. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter continued to October 13, 2001 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report re: Receipt & Acknowledgment of Money Into a Blocked Account.
